patterns.purpose: Reusable operating patterns and successful execution methods.
write_standard: Include constraints, expected format, and known gotchas.

learnings.purpose: Session-level discoveries that may later harden into patterns or playbooks.
write_standard: Promote to patterns only after reuse or validation.

results.purpose: Task outputs, completion markers, and meaningful delivery artifacts.
write_standard: Store high-signal outcomes, not every intermediate step.

decisions.purpose: Architecture, policy, and operating model decisions.
write_standard: Explain what changed and why it changed.

approvals.purpose: Human approval outcomes and approval-gated workflow context.
write_standard: Store approval reason, decision, and scope.
Do not store raw conversational back-and-forth unless it changed policy.

products.purpose: Sellable offer context, delivery constraints, and product-specific operating knowledge.
write_standard: Capture durable commercial and implementation facts.

infra.purpose: Infrastructure, deployment, host setup, and runtime behavior.
write_standard: Store host rules, runtime paths, service behavior, and recovery guidance.
